title: Wario Land: Super Mario Land 3
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Platformer game.

A stout treasure hunter in side view carrying a sack in a compact ruin or cliffside path with coins, bricks, and a visible drop below, planting their feet before pushing deeper toward treasure.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- Game Boy aesthetic, green monochrome palette, crisp pixel forms, portable mood, and very clean value separation
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- greedy, heavy, playful

Composition:
- single stout explorer only, side-view platform read, one treasure cue, chunky foreground shapes
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Important - do NOT include: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Wario likeness, avoid official hat and mustache codes, avoid exact coin iconography, avoid resemblance to mario. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no recognizable IP.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Wario likeness, avoid official hat and mustache codes, avoid exact coin iconography, avoid resemblance to mario
revised_prompt: Imagine a pixel art scene inspired by the retro platformer game style, particularly reminiscent of the Game Boy aesthetic. Picture a stout treasure hunter, depicted from a side view. They're standing on a compact, cliffside path of a ruin, clutching a sack, their feet planted firmly on the ground as they prepare to delve deeper. The path is dotted with brick blocks and generic coins, with a dangerous drop visible below. The image is designed to be decipherable within a second, featuring a strong silhouette of the treasure hunter as the only primary focal subject. It utilizes a clean, green monochrome palette, with sharp pixel forms and distinct value separation to produce a modern interpretation of retro limitations. The mood is greedy, playful, and heavy. There are no additional characters, clutter, or collage elements. It's a scene befitting the adventurous spirit of a treasure hunt, yet free from direct replication of any official game characters or assets. The output is high in clarity and contrast, devoid of any text or watermarks, and does not resemble any copyrighted characters or recognizable intellectual properties.
